purpose: Merge Confucius Compute Wisdom with Base Batches as a second purpose rail for scalable utility auditing, verification, and transparent receipt grouping.

new_purpose_leaf.purpose: Batch many Wisdom Reports or receipt events into reviewable Merkle roots for scaled utility verification.

risk_notes: This is not an onchain Base transaction.
This is not an EAS attestation.
This is not a deployed backend.
This is a GitHub receipt and candidate purpose extension only.
canon_line: Confucius gives builders Wisdom. Base Batches give receipts scale. Verification makes it legitimate.
